children.html: E[y∣X]=arg⁡min⁡m(X)E[(y−m(X))2]E[y|X] = \arg \min_{m(X)} E[(y-m(X))^2]E[y∣X]=argm(X)min​E[(y−m(X))2]

children.value:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

np.random.seed(0)
true_beta = np.array([3, 5, 7])
d = len(true_beta)
n = 100
X = np.random.uniform(size=n * d).reshape(-1, d)
y = X @ true_beta + np.random.normal(size=n)
